name: Wound repair / suturing
description: Primary closure of laceration or surgical wound with sutures.

name: Wound debridement and dressing
description: Cleaning, debridement of necrotic tissue, and dressing of wound.

name: Incision and drainage of abscess
description: Incision and drainage of superficial abscess or boil.

name: Suture removal
description: Removal of surgical sutures or skin staples after wound healing.

name: Male circumcision
description: Surgical removal of foreskin. Common procedure in Tanzania.

name: Lipoma / cyst excision
description: Excision of subcutaneous lipoma or sebaceous cyst.

name: Skin biopsy
description: Punch or incisional skin biopsy for histopathology.

name: Foreign body removal (soft tissue)
description: Removal of foreign body (splinter, glass, metal) from soft tissue.

name: Nail avulsion
description: Removal of fingernail or toenail, with or without matrixectomy.

name: Simple tooth extraction
description: Extraction of single tooth under local anaesthesia.

name: Dental abscess drainage
description: Incision and drainage of intraoral dental abscess.

name: Foreign body removal from ear
description: Removal of foreign body from external ear canal.

name: Foreign body removal from nose
description: Removal of nasal foreign body using probe or forceps.

name: Epistaxis management (nasal packing)
description: Anterior nasal packing for persistent nosebleed.

name: Perineal tear / episiotomy repair
description: Repair of perineal laceration or episiotomy after vaginal delivery.

name: Manual removal of retained placenta
description: Manual removal of placenta when controlled cord traction fails.

name: Manual vacuum evacuation (postpartum)
description: Evacuation of retained products of conception after delivery.

name: Chest tube insertion (intercostal drain)
description: Insertion of intercostal chest drain for pneumothorax or haemothorax.

name: Lumbar puncture
description: Diagnostic lumbar puncture for CSF analysis.

name: Emergency cricothyroidotomy
description: Emergency surgical airway when intubation fails.

name: Closed fracture reduction and splinting
description: Closed reduction of simple fracture with splint or cast application.

name: Joint dislocation reduction
description: Closed reduction of dislocated joint (shoulder, finger).

name: Intravenous cannula insertion
description: Insertion of peripheral IV cannula for fluid or medication.

name: Urinary catheterisation
description: Insertion of urinary catheter for retention or monitoring.

name: Corneal foreign body removal
description: Removal of foreign body from cornea or conjunctiva.

name: Chalazion incision
description: Incision and drainage of chalazion (eyelid cyst).
